description: Fox News headlines from Google Publisher RSS feeds on moxie.foxnews.com — section-selectable, no API key.

novel_features.name: Section headlines
novel_features.description: Fetch headlines from a Fox News RSS section (latest, world, politics, science, health, sports, travel, tech, opinion, video); defaults to latest.

novel_features.name: List sections
novel_features.description: List available RSS section ids and feed paths for agents choosing a topic.

novel_features.name: Agent context
novel_features.description: Emit structured JSON describing commands, RSS sections, default_section latest, and Drudge commands not available on this CLI.
